The '''''Lanigiro''''' was [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] transport used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. She was carrying medical supplies to the [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']] while the ''[[Nemesis]]'' [[Skirmish near Gelgelar|attacked]] the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]. Upon completion of the transfer of the medical supplies, the ''Lanigiro'' stayed and backed up the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Lanigiro'' is the word ''original'' spelt backwards.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
